name: copy note via UI button and paste into a new note preserves all formatting

labels.name: titlePath
labels.value: > chromium > notes.copy.spec.ts > notes copy and paste

titlePath: > chromium > notes.copy.spec.ts > notes copy and paste

steps.name: Create a note with rich formatting via API
API note creation should succeed with 200
Open note, enter edit mode, and click Copy note button
The created note card should be visible in the notes list getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Original Copy Test Note 1784796682656-8d7d19' }).first()
Click getByTestId('note-card').filter({ hasText: 'Original Copy Test Note 1784796682656-8d7d19' }).first().getByRole('heading', { level: 2 })
The note content should load and display formatted header locator('.note-content')
The Copy note button should be visible in the EditView getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy note' })
The Copy note button should be enabled once content is loaded getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('button', { name: 'Copy note' })
Create a new note and paste copied content into it
The Note title input field should be visible getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Note title' })
Wait for default draft title to clear getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Note title' })
Fill "Pasted Copy Test Note 1784796682656-8d7d19" getByTestId('editor-container').getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Note title' })
Verify pasted note description matches original note description via API
GET "get-notes"
